items.definition_en: A wireless speaker that connects to devices using Bluetooth technology.
items.example_en: She played music from her Bluetooth speaker in the garden.

items.definition_en: An electronic device for automatically controlling home temperature with smart features.
items.example_en: He adjusted the smart thermostat from his phone.

items.definition_en: A gadget that lets you watch online content on your TV.
items.example_en: They use a streaming device for watching movies online.

items.definition_en: A small machine that cleans floors automatically.
items.example_en: The robot vacuum cleaned the living room while they were out.

items.definition_en: A long, narrow speaker for better TV sound quality.
items.example_en: He connected the soundbar to his television for deeper sound.

items.definition_en: A portable electronic device for reading digital books.
items.example_en: She always brings her e-reader on holiday.

items.definition_en: A plug that lets you control power using your phone or voice.
items.example_en: He switched off the lamp with a smart plug.

items.definition_en: A personal computer designed to be used at a desk.
items.example_en: Her desktop computer starts up quickly in the morning.

items.definition_en: A doorbell with a camera that shows visitors on your phone.
items.example_en: The video doorbell recorded when someone rang.

items.definition_en: A machine that cleans the air in a room from dust and allergens.
items.example_en: She bought an air purifier for her allergy symptoms.

items.definition_en: A device or area for charging several electronic items at once.
items.example_en: They keep all their phones at the charging station overnight.

items.definition_en: A screen that shows digital photos in a frame.
items.example_en: A digital frame displays his family pictures on the shelf.

items.definition_en: Several speakers placed around a room for 3D audio.
items.example_en: The surround system made the movie sound amazing.

items.definition_en: A home phone that can be used without a cord.
items.example_en: She answered the cordless phone from the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A wearable device that records your activities and steps.
items.example_en: His fitness tracker counts how many steps he takes each day.

items.definition_en: A machine used to reduce humidity in a room.
items.example_en: They run a dehumidifier to keep the air dry.

items.definition_en: An electronic kitchen appliance for cooking rice automatically.
items.example_en: He always uses a rice cooker for dinner.

items.definition_en: A machine that washes dishes automatically.
items.example_en: She turned the dishwasher on after dinner.

items.definition_en: A device that produces ice automatically.
items.example_en: The ice maker is built into the refrigerator.

items.definition_en: A light bulb you control with an app or voice assistant.
items.example_en: He set the smart light to turn on at sunset.
